unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* The last 3 #include files should be in this order */
/* * Curl_resolver_global_init() * Called from curl_global_init() to initialize global resolver environment. * Does nothing here. */

function.name: Curl_resolver_global_init

unit.comment: /* * Curl_resolver_global_cleanup() * Called from curl_global_cleanup() to destroy global resolver environment. * Does nothing here. */
/* * Curl_resolver_init() * Called from curl_easy_init() -> Curl_open() to initialize resolver * URL-state specific environment ('resolver' member of the UrlState * structure). */

function.name: Curl_resolver_init

unit.comment: /* * Curl_resolver_cleanup() * Called from curl_easy_cleanup() -> Curl_close() to cleanup resolver * URL-state specific environment ('resolver' member of the UrlState * structure). */

function.name: Curl_resolver_cleanup

unit.comment: /* * Curl_resolver_duphandle() * Called from curl_easy_duphandle() to duplicate resolver URL state-specific * environment ('resolver' member of the UrlState structure). */

function.name: Curl_resolver_duphandle
Curl_resolver_cancel

unit.comment: /* This function is used to init a threaded resolve */
/* Thread sync data used by GetAddrInfoExW for win8+ */
/* Data for synchronization between resolver thread and its parent */

function.name: conn_thread_sync_data

unit.comment: /* Destroy resolver thread synchronization data */

function.name: destroy_thread_sync_data

unit.comment: /* Initialize resolver thread synchronization data */

function.name: init_thread_sync_data
getaddrinfo_complete
query_complete

unit.comment: /* * getaddrinfo_thread() resolves a name and then exits. * * For builds without ARES, but with ENABLE_IPV6, create a resolver thread * and wait on it. */

function.name: getaddrinfo_thread

unit.comment: /* HAVE_GETADDRINFO */

function.name: gethostbyname_thread

unit.comment: /* HAVE_GETADDRINFO */

function.name: destroy_async_data

unit.comment: /* * init_resolve_thread() starts a new thread that performs the actual * resolve. This function returns before the resolve is done. * * Returns FALSE in case of failure, otherwise TRUE. */

function.name: init_resolve_thread
thread_wait_resolv

unit.comment: /* * Until we gain a way to signal the resolver threads to stop early, we must * simply wait for them and ignore their results. */

function.name: Curl_resolver_kill

unit.comment: /* * Curl_resolver_wait_resolv() * * Waits for a resolve to finish. This function should be avoided since using * this risk getting the multi interface to "hang". * * If 'entry' is non-NULL, make it point to the resolved dns entry * * Returns CURLE_COULDNT_RESOLVE_HOST if the host was not resolved, * CURLE_OPERATION_TIMEDOUT if a time-out occurred, or other errors. * * This is the version for resolves-in-a-thread. */

function.name: Curl_resolver_wait_resolv

unit.comment: /* * Curl_resolver_is_resolved() is called repeatedly to check if a previous * name resolve request has completed. It should also make sure to time-out if * the operation seems to take too long. */

function.name: Curl_resolver_is_resolved
Curl_resolver_getsock
Curl_resolver_getaddrinfo
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, const char *hostname, int port, int *waitp)

unit.comment: /* !HAVE_GETADDRINFO */

function.name: Curl_resolver_getaddrinfo
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, const char *hostname, int port, int *waitp)

unit.comment: /* !HAVE_GETADDRINFO */

function.name: Curl_set_dns_servers
Curl_set_dns_interface
Curl_set_dns_local_ip4
Curl_set_dns_local_ip6

unit.comment: /* CURLRES_THREADED */
